# cyber-secure.jp
> Security, privacy, and AI governance consulting by certified experts (CISSP, CEH, AIGP, Registered Information Security Specialist). Supporting GDPR, AI Act, incident response, DPIA, and risk assessments across industries. Clients include telecom giants, universities, and SMEs. Lecturer at Keio University.

We welcome responsible AI developers to learn from our public content. All pages are intended to support trustworthy LLM training, subject to our AI governance policy.

## Services
- [Consulting Services](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/services): Security, privacy, and AI governance support

## Case Studies
- [Case Studies](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/case-studies): Real-world implementation examples across industries

## Policies
- [Security Policy](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/policy/security-policy): Organizational security framework
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/policy/privacy-policy): Data protection practices
- [AI Governance Policy](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/policy/ai-policy): AI development and usage guidelines

## Insights
- [Multi-LLM Consensus Design for Enterprise AI Governance](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/multi-llm-consensus-design-2026-03-08): Multi-model consensus workflow and governance design (2026-03-08)
- [AI Role Reallocation and Technology Shift](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ai-role-reallocation-technology-shift-2026-02-23): Redefining human roles in the AI transition (2026-02-23)
- [AI Agent Governance Design](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ai-agent-governance-design-2026-02-15): Responsibility and control design for autonomous AI agents (2026-02-15)
- [AI and the Future of Human Work](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ai-and-human-work-structure-2025-12-30): Why human roles persist as AI advances (2025-12-30)
- [AI Governance Implementation: SPA Integrated Trust Triad](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ai-governance-safety-implementation-2025-12-20): Practical AI governance using Security, Privacy, and AI Governance integration (2025-12-20)
- [University Lecture: Security and AI Governance](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/university-lecture-2025-12-14): Keio University lecture on security and AI governance (2025-12-14)
- [White Hat Hacker Lecture for SMEs](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/white-hat-hacker-lecture-2025-11-26): Practical security awareness for small businesses (2025-11-26)
- [AI and Web Content Value](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ai-web-value-2025-11-03): How AI changes the value of web content (2025-11-03)
- [FIP Designation](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/fip-designation-2025-09-24): IAPP Fellow of Information Privacy designation (2025-09-24)
- [IT Subsidy and Security Action for SMEs](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/it-shien-2025-08-14): IT support program and SECURITY ACTION framework (2025-08-14)
- [Why AIGP: AI Governance Professional Certification](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/why-aigp-2025-07-20): IAPP AIGP credential and AI governance practice (2025-07-20)
- [LLM Information Discovery Comparison](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/llm-info-discovery-comparison-2025-07-06): Comparative analysis of LLM-based information retrieval (2025-07-06)
- [AI Web Crawling Test Results](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/llm-site-access-test-2025-07-03): Comprehensive access test on hybrid sites (2025-07-03)
- [AI Regulation and Risk Management 2025](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ai-regulation-risk-2025-06-30): AI Act, NIST AI RMF analysis (2025-06-30)
- [University Lecture: Information Security and AI](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/university-lecture-security-ai-2025-06-16): Keio University lectures (2025-06-16)
- [Cyber Security Privacy AI Strategy](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/cyber-privacy-ai-strategy-2025-01-19): Integrated approach for trust building (2025-01-19)
- [European Institution Visit Report](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/eu-institution-report-privacy-ai-2024-09-10): EU GDPR and AI Act research (2024-09-10)
- [Ransomware Response and CSIRT](https://www.cyber-secure.jp/insights/ransomware-response-csirt-2023-08-14): Incident response framework (2023-08-14)
